prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GTX5544R Gen II** turbocharger (86mm compressor wheel, 106mm turbine) paired with a **Czinger-specific billet aluminum compressor housing** to handle the **2.88L flat-plane crank V8 (CZN-21C-FPC)**'s 11,000 RPM redline and 1,350 HP target, utilizing **titanium-aluminide turbine wheels** for reduced inertia and faster spool under the car’s **Dry Sump Lubrication System**

Installation of a **Motec M150 ECU** with Czinger’s proprietary **AI-driven torque vectoring algorithm**, recalibrated for **E85 flex-fuel compatibility** and **1,200+ HP on 93 octane**, featuring **individual cylinder fueling and ignition trims** to optimize the **dual overhead cam (DOHC) 32-valve V8** with **titanium intake valves and sodium-filled exhaust valves**

Replacement of the OEM **carbon-fiber driveshaft** with a **Pankl Racing Systems 3D-printed titanium driveshaft** (weighing 4.2 lbs) and **AP Racing CCX4 10-piston calipers** clamping **380mm carbon-ceramic rotors** (with **radial vane cooling channels**) to match the **1,350 HP output**, paired with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (345/25 R21 front, 355/25 R22 rear)** on **HRE FF16 forged wheels (21x12.5 front, 22x13 rear)**
estetica: Application of a **Czinger-exclusive **AeroBlade** carbon-fiber rear wing** (3D-printed in **Toray T1100G carbon fiber**) with **active Gurney flaps** and **NACA duct integration** for **1,200 lbs of downforce at 180 mph**, replacing the OEM **Blackbird Edition’s fixed wing**

Installation of a **Rocket Bunny x Czinger **Pandem Widebody Kit** (Type-B)**, featuring **hand-laid carbon-fiber fenders (2.5-inch wider front, 3-inch wider rear)** with **integrated LED turn signals** and **quick-release Dzus fasteners** for rapid wheel/tire swaps, paired with **custom-molded front splitter extensions** (in **Zylon-reinforced carbon fiber**) for **30% more front downforce**

Replacement of the OEM **titanium exhaust system** with a **Czinger x Akrapovič **Titanium Full Titanium Exhaust** (with **Inconel 625 headers and 3.5-inch diameter piping**)**, featuring **electronically controlled butterfly valves** for **adjustable backpressure** and **dual 120mm carbon-fiber tips** (angled at **15 degrees for optimal airflow extraction**), finished in **PVD-coated titanium** for heat resistance and aesthetic durability
